response:
The Jurassic Park star who was also in the Rainbow Warrior is **Sam Neill**. 

Sam Neill played Dr. Alan Grant in *Jurassic Park* (1993) and reprised the role in *Jurassic Park III* (2001). He appeared in the 1993 television film *The Rainbow Warrior* (also known as *The Sinking of the Rainbow Warrior*), which is based on the events of the Rainbow Warrior bombing.
